name: Gorgias
auth_notes: The official Gorgias MCP server uses OAuth2. HTTP integrations support both Header-based (Bearer token) and OAuth2 authentication.
mcp_notes: Gorgias provides an official MCP server in open beta for paid plan customers, accessible via mcp.gorgias.com.
access_notes: Access to Gorgias APIs and the ability to create HTTP integrations requires a paid Gorgias subscription.
api_notes: Gorgias provides a REST API for integrations. While documentation for a comprehensive public REST API is managed via their platform, HTTP integrations allow external systems to communicate with Gorgias events and data.
one_liner: Gorgias is a conversational commerce and helpdesk platform for e-commerce brands that unifies customer support channels and AI agents with store data.

evidence.claim: Gorgias supports building HTTP integrations using the third-party's public API or via a REST-based connection, available on all helpdesk plans (which are paid).
Gorgias provides an official Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for paid plan customers.
Search citation: The Conversational AI platform for Ecommerce | Gorgias
Search citation: Gorgias API Integration - Build & Ship Faster with Merge
